description: Letter from a certain Moshe to a certain Shemuʾel. Mainly in Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: 1548 Seleucid = 1236/37 CE. In which the writer expresses his longings and writes about enemies. The address is written in a different hand than the rest of the letter. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב ממשה לשמואל. ביהודית-ערבית. תאריך: 1548 לשטרות = 1236/37. מביע געגועים וכותב על אויבים. דורש בדיקה נוספת.
